meaning: n.南瓜,易压烂的物品,拥挤的人群,壁球v.压扁,压制,镇压,挤进,挤压
examples: He hurt his back playing squash.
I enjoy playing tennis and squash.
The White-Collar Crime logo on a hat is a must-have for the Harvard Club squash courts.
World Squash Federation President N Ramachandran said the whole sport was "hugely disappointed" after being rejected.
